codeReview.summary: Current HEAD satisfies the feature contract. Commit 9f8ba8b wires live DeFiLlama token pricing into token detail/info surfaces and recently-updated token info, while token OHLCV now attempts swap-derived aggregation from live pool trades before falling back to synthetic seeded series. The added route tests explicitly distinguish live-derived token outputs from degraded fallback behavior.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the mission metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, onchain-api-worker skill, commit 9f8ba8b, and current HEAD implementation/tests. The feature now uses live swap-backed pool data for token OHLCV when available, surfaces live DeFiLlama pricing on token detail/info routes and related token-info surfaces, preserves graceful seeded fallback when providers fail, and includes explicit route-level proof for both live and fallback token behavior.
